name: Phase 11 Integrations and migration requirements matrix

rows.requirement: Integration adapter foundation and ExternalMapping model
evidence: Phase 11 contract defines adapter foundation, ExternalMapping, idempotency, permissions, and E2E expectations before implementation.

packages/integrations/src/index.ts implements tenant-owned IntegrationAdapterDefinition, IntegrationConnection, ExternalPayloadEnvelope, ExternalMapping, ExternalMappingDiagnostic, AdapterFailure, SyncAuditEvent, deterministic mapping keys, deterministic import idempotency keys, typed validation errors, defensive payload/metadata cloning, and secret-looking diagnostic/audit-detail redaction.

packages/integrations/src/integrationAdapterFoundation.test.ts proves adapter/connection validation, payload immutability, tenant-scoped mapping/idempotency keys, diagnostics and sync-audit redaction, typed adapter failure/audit event creation, and invalid input typed errors.

packages/access-control/src/index.ts defines P11 integration permissions: integration.read, integration.preview, integration.apply, integration.mapping.read, integration.audit.read, and integration.admin.
packages/access-control/src/accessProfile.test.ts proves the P11 integration permissions compose into a tenant-scoped integration admin access profile.
tests: npm test -- packages/integrations/src/integrationAdapterFoundation.test.ts exit 1 RED: P11 adapter foundation functions were missing before implementation
npm test -- packages/access-control/src/accessProfile.test.ts exit 1 RED: P11 integration permission constants were missing before implementation
npm test -- packages/integrations/src/integrationAdapterFoundation.test.ts exit 0: 1 file, 6 tests passed
npm test -- packages/integrations/src/integrationAdapterFoundation.test.ts exit 1 RED during bug-hunt: sync audit details were cloned but not redacted before diagnostic/API use
npm test -- packages/integrations/src/integrationAdapterFoundation.test.ts exit 0 after audit-detail redaction fix: 1 file, 7 tests passed
npm test -- packages/access-control/src/accessProfile.test.ts exit 0: 1 file, 10 tests passed
npm test -- packages/integrations/src/integrationAdapterFoundation.test.ts packages/access-control/src/accessProfile.test.ts exit 0: 2 files, 16 tests passed
npm test -- packages/integrations packages/access-control exit 0: 4 files, 27 tests passed
npm test exit 0: 94 files, 540 tests passed
npm run typecheck exit 0
npm run lint exit 0
rows.cleanup: P11-001 is pure domain/access-control code with no runtime state. Phase cleanup remains blocked for this row until P11-009 E2E-100/E2E-101/E2E-104 proves fixture reset/readback for mappings, idempotency state, sync audit, and adapter mode.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T06:10:03.3842976+07:00: P11-001 domain/access-control implementation is complete, but the row remains blocked for strict phase exit until required E2E-100, E2E-101, and E2E-104 structured evidence exists.

evidence: Phase 11 contract requires a non-mutating mock adapter preview mapping external payloads to canonical opportunity/project/task data.
tests: Pending P11-002 implementation: expected preview/domain tests proving no mutation and validation report contents.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must restore preview tokens, external payload fixtures, and canonical entities created during tests.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-002 product code is not implemented yet; preview behavior is specified but has no executable domain evidence.

rows.requirement: Idempotent import apply and mapping persistence
evidence: Phase 11 contract requires repeated imports to reuse tenant-scoped mappings and avoid duplicate canonical records.
tests: Pending P11-003 implementation: expected idempotency and mapping persistence unit/API tests.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must reset import batches, idempotency keys, mappings, and canonical readbacks.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-003 implementation has not started; no idempotent apply command or mapping readback exists yet.

rows.requirement: Sync audit, retry/rate-limit, and safe failure model
evidence: Phase 11 contract requires structured adapter failures, rate-limit/retry metadata, safe diagnostics, and no partial canonical mutation.
tests: Pending P11-004 implementation: expected failure-mode domain/API tests and audit readback tests.
rows.cleanup: Pending implementation: cleanup must reset adapter failure modes, retry counters, sync audit events, and failed import batches.
rows.blocker: 2026-05-17T05:55:38.9918634+07:00: P11-004 implementation has not started; failure diagnostics and retry/rate-limit model are contract-only.

rows.requirement: Migration validation report and dry-run summary
evidence: Phase 11 contract requires import preview to return validation reports with creates, updates, skips, errors, blockers, and recovery text.
tests: Pending P11-005 implementation: expected validation report and dry-run summary tests.

rows.requirement: Integrations API and governed import commands
evidence: Phase 11 contract defines adapter, connection, import preview/apply, batch, mapping, audit, and diagnostics API contracts.

evidence: Phase 11 contract requires imported canonical projects and tasks to remain operable after the adapter is disconnected or failing.
